name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are a finite set of Message *)
AllMessages == [msg \in messages |-> Message]

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator = "Start"
        /\ messages = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorPrepare == /\ coordinator = "Start"
                     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Prepare] : p \in Participants }
                     /\ coordinator' = "WaitingForVotes"

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                      /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                      /\ [sender |-> p, type |-> Prepare] \in messages
                      /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, type |-> Prepare] }
                      /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedYes"]
                      /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> p, type |-> VoteYes] }

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote No *)
ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                     /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                     /\ [sender |-> p, type |-> Prepare] \in messages
                     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, type |-> Prepare] }
                     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedNo"]
                     /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> p, type |-> VoteNo] }

(* Coordinator receives all Yes votes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorCommit == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                     /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Commit] : p \in Participants }
                     /\ coordinator' = "Committed"

(* Coordinator receives any No vote and sends Abort *)
CoordinatorAbort == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                    /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                    /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Abort] : p \in Participants }
                    /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to Committed *)
ParticipantCommit == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                     /\ participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                     /\ [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Commit] \in messages
                     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Commit] }
                     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to Aborted *)
ParticipantAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants :
                    /\ participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                    /\ [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Abort] \in messages
                    /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator, type |-> Abort] }
                    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == CoordinatorPrepare \/ ParticipantVoteYes \/ ParticipantVoteNo \/ CoordinatorCommit \/ CoordinatorAbort \/ ParticipantCommit \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VotedYes", "VotedNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "WaitingForVotes", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets(Message)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == states[i] = "eating"
Thinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

HungryToEating(i) == /\ Hungry(i)
                   /\ CanEat(i)
                   /\ TakeForks(i)

EatingToThinking(i) == /\ Eating(i)
                     /\ PutForks(i)

Next == \E i \in 1..N : (HungryToEating(i) \/ EatingToThinking(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
         /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* TypeOK ensures num is a sequence of N integers and flag is a sequence of N booleans *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in Seq(N)
          /\ flag \in Seq(N)

(* Initial state: all flag false, all num 0 *)
Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
          /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Next action: a process i can either set flag[i] to FALSE (exit) or
   set flag[i] to TRUE and assign num[i] to 1 + Max(num) *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          \/ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element e *)
Enqueue(e) == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, e)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
  \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {}
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = {}
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
